name: agentdeck
description: Real-time web cockpit for supervising AI coding agents

scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web

author: Yannick CAISE <yannick.caise@gmail.com> (https://github.com/yetouse)
